bead.title: Stabilize and document the heimq-handlers embedder contract and SASL ownership
bead.description: Document the supported public embedder contract required by Niflheim: codec request/response envelope entrypoints; the async Produce handler with context and config store; Metadata, ApiVersions, and InitProducerId handlers; and RecordBatchView::decode_all. Record the architectural decision that TLS/SASL authentication remains embedder-owned and is intentionally outside heimq-handlers dispatch. Add API-level tests or compile-time coverage sufficient to detect accidental surface removal.
bead.acceptance: 1. Public rustdoc identifies codec::{decode_request, decode_request_bytes, encode_response, encode_response_body}, produce::handle_async_with_context_and_config_store, the Metadata/ApiVersions/InitProducerId handlers, and RecordBatchView::decode_all as supported embedder APIs. 2. A governing HELIX artifact explicitly states that TLS/SASL is embedder-owned and Heimq handlers do not own authentication. 3. Tests exercise or compile against every named entrypoint. 4. cargo test --workspace --all-features and cargo doc --workspace --no-deps complete successfully.
